title: Upon Groynes. Epig.
content:
Groynes, for his fleshly burglary of late,
    Stood in the holy forum candidate;
    The word is Roman; but in English known:
    Penance, and standing so, are both but one.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Groynes. Epig.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
